episodes.title: DOJ publishes missing Epstein files involving claims about Trump
episodes.description: The files involve accusations made by a woman against President Donald Trump that officials said were "mistakenly withheld" during an earlier review.

episodes.title: House Oversight recommends holding the Clintons in contempt over Epstein subpoenas
episodes.description: The Committee made the recommendation after the Clintons failed to comply with the committee subpoenas related to the investigation
